title: TraderNPCs
description: A Taterzens addon that adds ability to create GUI traders.
body:
# TraderNPCs
A [Taterzens](https://modrinth.com/mod/taterzens) addon that adds ability to create GUI traders.

## Features
* simple GUI editing
* supports any items

![Screenshot_20211128_195950](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/34912839/143782051-bdd1402f-8995-4dde-8c2c-3e17de6382c6.png)


![Screenshot_20211128_195855](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/34912839/143782029-65abe757-e8a9-47a9-918e-4cca2e4041a3.png)
